languages.text: "Узрите, братья и сестры, свежатина высшего сорта сама пришла к нам в руки!"

traits.locale_text: "Узрите, братья и сестры, свежатина высшего сорта сама пришла к нам в руки!"
"Узрите, братья и сестры, свежатина высшего сорта сама пришла к нам в руки!"

languages.text: "Behold, brothers and sisters, here comes fresh meat! Premium grade, straight into our arms!"
languages.original_text: "Узрите, братья и сестры, свежатина высшего сорта сама пришла к нам в руки!"

traits.locale_text: "Behold, brothers and sisters, here comes fresh meat! Premium grade, straight into our arms!"
"Behold, brothers and sisters, here comes fresh meat! Premium grade, straight into our arms!"
"Behold, brothers and sisters, here comes fresh meat! Premium grade, straight into our arms!"

languages.text: "Seht her, Brüder und Schwestern, hier kommt frisches Fleisch! Premiumqualität, direkt in unsere Arme!"
languages.original_text: "Behold, brothers and sisters, here comes fresh meat! Premium grade, straight into our arms!"

languages.text: "Voici, frères et sœurs, de la viande fraîche ! De première qualité, directement dans nos bras !"
languages.original_text: "Behold, brothers and sisters, here comes fresh meat! Premium grade, straight into our arms!"

languages.text: "看啊，兄弟姐妹们，新鲜的肉来了！高级货，直接送到我们怀里！"
languages.original_text: "Behold, brothers and sisters, here comes fresh meat! Premium grade, straight into our arms!"

languages.text: "¡Contemplad, hermanos y hermanas, aquí viene carne fresca! De primera calidad, ¡directamente a nuestros brazos!"
languages.original_text: "Behold, brothers and sisters, here comes fresh meat! Premium grade, straight into our arms!"

languages.text: 「見よ、兄弟姉妹よ、新鮮な肉の登場だ！プレミアム・グレードの肉が我々の腕の中に！"
languages.original_text: "Behold, brothers and sisters, here comes fresh meat! Premium grade, straight into our arms!"

languages.text: "Bakın kardeşlerim, işte taze et geliyor! Birinci sınıf, doğrudan kollarımıza!"
languages.original_text: "Behold, brothers and sisters, here comes fresh meat! Premium grade, straight into our arms!"
